productDisplayName: Arrow Woman Printed Multi Coloured Top
description: Composition Floral print round neck top made of 100% viscose, sleeveless, has a box pleat design on the chest and a concealed zipper on the left side below the armhole Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to every fashionista. This top is a a tried-and-true favourite with a slouchy silhouette that flatters your curves. Pair it with form-fitting denims and kitten heels. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
